This REST API is used by the Zero Trust Branch (ZTB) UI to interact with the Legacy ZTB API (NodeJS) and / or ZTB Microservices.
It uses the JWT token Authorization using Authorization headers.

API to Validate SSO Email domain and get OIDC config This configuration containing `issuer` and `client_id` is used by UI to get the access token for Okta using pkce flow
https://developer.okta.com/code/angular/okta_angular_auth_js/
https://developer.okta.com/docs/guides/implement-auth-code-pkce/overview/
The `access_token` is then submited to `/v2/auth/sso-token endpoint` to generate our application JWT token using the Okta Access token
